task: Using only the embedded packet provided, analyze the solvent degradation drivers for Train A, classify failures (chemical-health vs capture-performance), compute which combination of available actions (reclaim, carbon filter, bleed-and-feed) will restore all failed metrics within a $190,000 budget, perform sensitivity checks for capture meter bias +/-1.2 percentage points, and deliver an executable workbook and a gate-decision memo that document formulas, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the packet, validation checks, uncertainty notes, and a final decision table with pass/warn/fail/needs_review labels.
